a.xlink:title: High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.

System for applying scale transformations based on ScaleStateComponent.
System for composing final transforms from separate state components.

Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.

Core type definitions and tag types for the helios engine.

Defines the EntityRegistry class for managing entity lifecycles.
